_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1-dependent tumors require a microenvironment containing Nf1+/-- and c-kit-dependent bone marrow.

_contextSnippet: Krox20;Nf1flox/flox mice are functionally WT in all non Schwann cell lineages and no neurofibromas are observed.
details: No neurofibromas observed in functionally WT mice in all non-Schwann cell lineages
